impact: The daemon can retry task checkbox-110 with deterministic fixes for the two observed validation failures: session nonce mismatch and false-positive private-artifact marker checks. The guidance keeps the next attempt fixture-only, small, and focused on tests rather than live DevHub automation or domain implementation.
summary: Add narrow supervisor repair guidance for the blocked DevHub Urban Forestry guardrail task.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 1 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-110: Add DevHub guardrail tests proving Urban Forestry application draft review can produce a preview but cannot perform official upload, certification, submission, payment, cancellation, or inspection scheduling without exact session-specific user confirmation.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
